description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet with a dark woodgrain finish, featuring two spacious drawers on the front. Each drawer is equipped with a horizontal, metallic bar handle, providing a modern and functional appearance. The cabinet's surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting additional office items or equipment. The sides and back are plain, with the woodgrain pattern continuing seamlessly around the structure. There are no visible label holders or lock mechanisms on the drawers, emphasizing a minimalist design. The overall build suggests it is intended for indoor use, likely in an office or workspace environment.
description: A dark woodgrain two-drawer filing cabinet with metallic bar handles and a flat, sturdy top. Minimalist design with no visible locks or label holders.
description_view_0: Front view showing two drawers with metallic bar handles and the woodgrain finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain woodgrain panel with no handles or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless woodgrain panel, matching the sides.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a continuous woodgrain pattern.
